full_text:
Liu Yi (Gongsi) 劉廙 (恭嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yi (劉廙), styledGongsi (恭嗣), was born in Nanyang. Among the officials that petitioned Emperor Xian to abdicate to Cao Pi. Liu Yi was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom. Liu Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
